default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss strategy for Reddit account and plan upcoming workshop to solidify Q1 roadmap and scope.](https://fathom.video/share/_su83ioZZwkEsmsaRD1TP1JxjSXqs1_z?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Reddit team lacks clear direction; need to help focus their efforts and define metrics](https://fathom.video/share/_su83ioZZwkEsmsaRD1TP1JxjSXqs1_z?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [Plan to propose concrete deliverables: content refresh, email templates, newsletter, sales tool](https://fathom.video/share/_su83ioZZwkEsmsaRD1TP1JxjSXqs1_z?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [Aiming for \~$45k/month contract; need compelling pitch to justify increased scope](https://fathom.video/share/_su83ioZZwkEsmsaRD1TP1JxjSXqs1_z?tab=summary&timestamp=1062.0)
  - [Schedule strategy workshop for early December to nail down Q1 priorities and scope](https://fathom.video/share/_su83ioZZwkEsmsaRD1TP1JxjSXqs1_z?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)

## Topics

### Reddit Account Challenges

  - [Team lacks clear direction and understanding of what to optimize for](https://fathom.video/share/_su83ioZZwkEsmsaRD1TP1JxjSXqs1_z?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [Difficult to get focused answers on goals and success metrics](https://fathom.video/share/_su83ioZZwkEsmsaRD1TP1JxjSXqs1_z?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [Need to simplify approach and identify key metrics to move](https://fathom.video/share/_su83ioZZwkEsmsaRD1TP1JxjSXqs1_z?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)

### Proposed Focus Areas

  - [Content refresh: Update existing cadences and create new ones](https://fathom.video/share/_su83ioZZwkEsmsaRD1TP1JxjSXqs1_z?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
  - [Email templates: Create \~30 email templates per month](https://fathom.video/share/_su83ioZZwkEsmsaRD1TP1JxjSXqs1_z?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
  - [Newsletter: Launch and manage ongoing newsletter](https://fathom.video/share/_su83ioZZwkEsmsaRD1TP1JxjSXqs1_z?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
  - [Sales tool: Build app for reps to personalize emails with transcripts](https://fathom.video/share/_su83ioZZwkEsmsaRD1TP1JxjSXqs1_z?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### HubSpot Limitations

  - [Basic email platform with limited API capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/_su83ioZZwkEsmsaRD1TP1JxjSXqs1_z?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [Potential workarounds using workflows and API calls, but messy implementation](https://fathom.video/share/_su83ioZZwkEsmsaRD1TP1JxjSXqs1_z?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
  - [Lack of in-house HubSpot admin expertise is a constraint](https://fathom.video/share/_su83ioZZwkEsmsaRD1TP1JxjSXqs1_z?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)

### Workshop Planning

  - [Schedule for early December (latest second week)](https://fathom.video/share/_su83ioZZwkEsmsaRD1TP1JxjSXqs1_z?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)
  - [Goal: Nail down Q1 priorities and scope for contract renewal](https://fathom.video/share/_su83ioZZwkEsmsaRD1TP1JxjSXqs1_z?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
  - [Pre-read to be sent outlining potential areas of focus](https://fathom.video/share/_su83ioZZwkEsmsaRD1TP1JxjSXqs1_z?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
  - [Aim to get agreement in place by mid-December](https://fathom.video/share/_su83ioZZwkEsmsaRD1TP1JxjSXqs1_z?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)

### Resourcing Considerations
